title: stand alone player tracker
description: a stand alone player tracker to the game mostly for man hunts
body:
CompassTracker – Player Tracking Compass [Paper 1.16+]
“Turn any compass into a live player tracker – just rename it!”
Ever wanted a simple, vanilla-friendly way to hunt down your friends (or enemies) on a SMP or minigame server?
CompassTracker does exactly that:

Take a normal compass
Rename it on an anvil to any online player’s exact username
Hold it and it will constantly point to that player in real time

No commands, no permissions, no extra items required. Works in main hand or off hand.
If the target player logs off, the compass simply falls back to normal behavior (points to world spawn or last bed) until they come back online.
Perfect for:

Manhunt / speedrunner vs hunter servers
SMP betrayal moments
Hide & seek or prop hunt
Any server that wants lightweight player tracking without giving away coordinates

Features

Zero configuration – drop and go
Updates every 0.25 seconds (super smooth)
Works across the entire inventory (main/off hand checked, easily expandable)
Lightweight – only runs when players are online
Built for Paper 1.16–1.21+ (uses Lodestone API properly)

Download now and start the hunt! 🧭➜👤


# **thank you evryone who has supported me with this project!!**
